Functions to initialize and deinitialize the Rocky runtime context.

# Purpose
This is a C header file that declares two functions: [`rocky_runtime_context_init`](<#rocky_runtime_context_init>) and [`rocky_runtime_context_deinit`](<#rocky_runtime_context_deinit>). These functions are likely intended to initialize and deinitialize a runtime context, respectively.
